title: Jungle Demon
wikitext:
{{External|rs=Jungle demon}} {{Otheruses|the quest boss fought during [[Monkey Madness I]]|the [[Nightmare Zone]] variant|Jungle Demon (Nightmare Zone)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Jungle Demon |image = [[File:Jungle Demon.png|250px]] |release = [[6 December]] [[2004]] |update = Monkey Madness |members = Yes |combat = 195 |size = 3 |examine = A Greater Jungle Demon. A magical aura emanates from its hide. |attributes = Demon |xpbonus = 7.5 |max hit = 32 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Slash]], [[Magic]] |attack speed = 6 |hitpoints = 170 |att = 170 |str = 170 |def = 170 |mage = 170 |range = 1 |attbns = 50 |strbns = 50 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 50 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 50 |drange = 0 |elementalweaknesstype = Fire |elementalweaknesspercent = 25 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |id = 1443 }} The '''Jungle Demon''' is a quest monster fought during the [[Monkey Madness I]] quest. It is among the strongest [[demon|demons]] in the game. It uses extremely strong [[magic]] attacks, and when in range, a [[halberd]]-like [[melee]] attack. It is possible to stand to the side and let the [[gnome]]s spawned around the jungle demon lower its hitpoints down to 10 (players wishing to use this method should hide across the bridge at the edge of [[banana plantation (Ape Atoll)|the arena]]). Afterwards, player can run out to quickly finish it off. However, if the gnomes "kill" the demon, it will restore 12-25% of its hitpoints, so you cannot fully rely on the [[10th Squad]] to kill it. Players might also find it difficult to deal the final-blow depending on their combat level, leading to the demon restoring its hitpoints multiple times. Activate Protect from Magic, and drink any necessary [[potions]], '''''before''''' entering the fight. The Jungle Demon alternates between all four [[wave spells]] for its magic attacks, and its melee attack is like a halberd (which means that it can hit two tiles away). Both types of attacks can hit up to 32 damage. It can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete. Like all demons, it is susceptible to the effects of [[demonbane weapons]]. ==Recommended equipment== It is recommended that players bring 2-3 four dose [[prayer potion]]s depending on their [[Prayer]] level (37 for [[Protect from Magic]] makes the fight considerably easier). Without Protect from Magic, a high magic defence and lots of food may be required. The rest of your inventory should have [[monkfish]] or better, as well as magic or ranging equipment, depending on your method of attack. A single-click teleport can also be helpful in emergencies. ==Strategy== Bank in preparation for the [[Jungle Demon]] fight, and ensure you have full [[prayer points]] and health. When you are ready to fight, wear the sigil (you can do this from anywhere in RuneScape; no need to return to Ape Atoll), and you will be promptly teleported to the Jungle Demon's arena. Activate Protect from Magic '''''before''''' teleporting, and drink any necessary [[potions]]. The easiest way to kill the Jungle Demon is to hide at the edge of the arena, waiting until the gnomes get him down to about 10 hitpoints. Afterwards, you can run out and finish it quickly. The Jungle Demon will regenerate to 20% of its full health if you do not deal the final blow. Note that the demon's melee attack can hit you even if you're two squares away, similar to a halberd; ensure you're three or more squares away to avoid it. Additionally, '''standing still''' once you are teleported to the arena will keep distance between you and the Demon, who will not move until you do, although it will still attack you with Magic. For those without 37 Prayer, the above method is highly recommended. Be sure to equip high magic defence gear and farcast it using [[Ranged]] or Magic spells. Alternatively, a [[dragon dagger]] [[special attack]] can be used four times in a row, which is very likely to knock it out as well. Those with 37 Prayer can simply attack the Jungle Demon from a distance by either using Ranged or Magic spells while using the Protect from Magic prayer. Using a [[dwarf multicannon]], fewer than twenty (20) [[steel cannonball]]s may be used, making the cannon the most effective way to kill the demon. Although most demons are very weak to Magic, the Jungle Demon has a high magic level and high magic defence, so using Magic against it is not recommended. To avoid the demon continually healing when using magic, wait for the gnomes to get the demon to 15-20 hitpoints, then use [[Protect from Magic]] and run across the arena to another bridge. The gnomes won't follow, so you don't have to worry about the demon healing while your magic splashes. Due to the demon attacking with both Magic and melee at close range, it is not recommended to use melee. Doing so would prohibit you from praying against all damage. If melee is however your only option, be sure to use a [[Stab weapons|stab]] or [[crush weapon]] whilst praying protect from Magic, as the Jungle Demon has high [[slash]] defence. ==Drops== ===100%=== {{DropsTableHead|leagueRegion=Kandarin}} {{DropsLine|name=Malicious ashes|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 20 August 2025 |update = More Doom Tweaks, Poll 84, & Summer Sweep Up Changes |change = The Jungle Demon now has a 25% [[elemental weakness]] to [[fire spells]]. }} {{Subject changes |date = 20 October 2021 |update = Tombs of Amascut & Nex Rewards Beta |change = The Jungle Demon in the final battle of Monkey Madness now drops the correct ashes. }} {{Subject changes |date = 16 June 2021 |update = A Kingdom Divided |poll = A Kingdom Divided |change = The Jungle demon now drops [[malicious ashes]] in place of regular ashes. }} {{Subject changes |date = 29 August 2006 |update = Demons, Dragons and Giants |change = The NPC was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes |daterange = 7 – 14 March 2005 |change = The NPC's examine was changed from "''It's a large green Greater Jungle Demon. An aura of magic emanates from its hide.''" to "''A Greater Jungle Demon. A magical aura emanates from its hide.''" }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Jungle Demon (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Jungle Demon.png|center|300x150px]] |- |6 December 2004 –
29 August 2006 |29 August 2006 –
present |} ==Trivia== *If you kill the demon as it kills you (or if you kill it using [[Retribution]]), the kill will count and you will still be able to finish the quest. *The demon is currently the only one of its kind. {{Monkey Madness I}} {{Ape Atoll}} {{Demons}} [[Category:Bosses]] [[Category:Quest monsters]]
